name: Cloud Infrastructure Discovery
description: Detects enumeration of cloud infrastructure resources
query:
// Detect cloud infrastructure enumeration
// Trigger on AWS, Azure, or GCP resource listing
events from cloud_audit
where event_name matches "(?i)(DescribeInstances|ListBuckets|ListUsers|GetCallerIdentity|DescribeSecurityGroups|ListVirtualMachines|list-instances)"
group by user_identity
having count(*) > 15
within 300 seconds
